features.name: KPI collector: reads linkedin-daemon-state.json, linkedin-dm-queue.json, upwork-queue.json, CRMLite API → produces weekly_metrics object
Claude Haiku analysis: send metrics vs targets to haiku → returns { bottleneck, fix, action, confidence } JSON
Auto-executor: if confidence>0.9 AND action in allowlist (adjust_icp_threshold, rotate_strategy_cursor, adjust_cycle_frequency) → apply immediately
Approval queue: low-confidence actions → append to improvement-pending.json for human review via dashboard
Strategy performance tracker: per-strategy stats in linkedin-daemon-state.json (qualified_rate per strategy), auto-promote top 3
DM template A/B tracker: track reply rate per template variant, swap lowest-performing weekly
improvement-log.ndjson: append every analysis cycle { ts, metrics_snapshot, bottleneck, action_taken, auto_applied }
improvement-loop.js daemon: runs every 6h, hot-reloads business-goals.json without restart
Backend routes: GET /api/improvement/status, GET /api/improvement/log, GET /api/improvement/pending, POST /api/improvement/approve
Dashboard: Business Goals tab showing revenue gap bar chart, KPIs vs targets, recent auto-adjustments, pending approvals
